Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine and potassium, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal dysfunction. Low glucose and HbA1c may indicate hypoglycemia or altered glucose metabolism. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, high protein, bilirubin, ketones) further support renal impairment and possible hepatic involvement. Recommend prompt nephrology evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or hepatic disorders.
